note: Current buildHonestForecast re-run over history.json inputs (banks = current field, held constant). Calm-season false-alarm calibration.

regimeReliability.note: Reliability conditioned on each beach's OWN recent regime (calm/transition/high), split by predicted direction. Publish THIS, never a single global %, which blends regimes and hides that calm-season ALERTS are far less reliable than calm-season CLEAN calls. Always bind the figure to its window; for the freshest current-model number cite the reforecast output, not the archive blend.

headline.fr: 100% de nos prévisions « mer propre » (saison calme, 2026-05-19 → 2026-06-18) se sont vérifiées (sur 2805) ; les rares alertes restent signalées à faible confiance tant que la donnée ne les confirme pas.
headline.en: 100% of our "clean water" forecasts (calm season, 2026-05-19 → 2026-06-18) proved correct (over 2805); the rare alerts stay flagged low-confidence until the data confirms them.
headline.es: El 100% de nuestros pronósticos de "agua limpia" (temporada tranquila, 2026-05-19 → 2026-06-18) resultaron correctos (sobre 2805); las raras alertas se marcan con baja confianza hasta que el dato las confirma.
